props.name: items
props.description: An array of items to display in the scrollable list.

props.name: onItemSelect
props.description: Callback function triggered when an item is selected. Receives the selected item and its index.

props.name: showGradients
props.description: Toggle to display the top and bottom gradient overlays.

props.name: enableArrowNavigation
props.description: Toggle to enable keyboard navigation via arrow and tab keys.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS class names for the main container.

props.name: itemClassName
props.description: Additional CSS class names for each list item.

props.name: displayScrollbar
props.description: Toggle to display or hide the custom scrollbar.

props.name: initialSelectedIndex
props.description: Initial index of the selected item. Set to -1 for no selection.
